title: 매직 헤어브러시 광고

character.name: 꼬마
character.description: a cute chubby 3D Pixar-style little kid with big sparkly eyes and round cheeks

product.name: 매직 헤어브러시
product.description: a pink magic hairbrush with soft bristles

style: cute chunky 3D Pixar/Disney style, big sparkly eyes, soft studio lighting, glossy render, vertical 9:16

scenes.image_prompt: the kid just woke up and looks into a bathroom mirror in the morning, hair is a wild tangled bird-nest mess, gloomy disappointed face, soft morning light
scenes.motion_prompt: the kid slowly rubs sleepy eyes, then looks shocked and sad at the messy hair in the mirror, shoulders drooping

caption.en:
Woke up with
crazy bed hair...

narration.en: I woke up and my hair was a total mess.

scenes.image_prompt: the kid suddenly gets an idea and happily holds up the pink magic hairbrush next to the face, eyes lighting up with a spark
scenes.motion_prompt: the kid's face lights up with an idea, raises the hairbrush into view with a hopeful smile

caption.en:
Then I remembered...
the Magic Hairbrush!

narration.en: Then I remembered this magic hairbrush.

scenes.image_prompt: the kid brushes the messy hair with the pink magic hairbrush in one smooth stroke, sparkles trailing from the brush
scenes.motion_prompt: the kid brushes down through the hair in one satisfying smooth motion, magic sparkles follow the brush

narration.en: I gave it one smooth brush.

scenes.image_prompt: the kid now has perfectly styled glossy smooth hair, huge happy smile, sparkling clean look, confident pose, sparkles around
scenes.motion_prompt: the kid flips the perfectly styled shiny hair and beams a big confident smile at the camera, sparkles popping

narration.en: Perfect styling, done! You should try it too.
